campaign_metadata.name: The Wild Sheep Chase
campaign_metadata.description: A frantic sheep, a Scroll of Speak with Animals, and a fierce determination to get their attention. [cite: 4]
campaign_metadata.author: Richard Jansen-Parkes [cite: 251]
campaign_metadata.licenseType: Community Content Agreement for Dungeon Masters Guild [cite: 250]
campaign_metadata.attributionText: Copyright 2016 by Richard Jansen-Parkes and published under the Community Content Agreement for Dungeon Masters Guild. [cite: 251]

nodes.title: The Local Tavern
nodes.description: The party is idling away an afternoon. [cite: 18] There is a sound of clattering hooves, surprised yelps and a frantic bleating. [cite: 21] A beast appears to be a regular sheep in every way fluffy white coat, black face, curled horns but it is carrying an elaborate scroll in its mouth. [cite: 23] A wax seal purports that it is a Scroll of Speak With Animals (Modified). [cite: 25]

clues.reveal: The sheep's baaing instantly morphs into cultured, elven-accented Common. [cite: 27] The sheep introduces itself as Finethir Shinebright, a wizard in dire need of aid. [cite: 28]

nodes.title: The Ambush
nodes.description: A huge Half-Orc swaggers towards you, pushing his way through the crowd without a care for anybody standing in his way. [cite: 43] In front of him walk appear to be large wolves wearing iron collars, while a hulking figure in a dirty brown cloak travels in his wake. [cite: 44] He demands that he be given Master Noke's sheep. [cite: 46, 48]

clues.reveal: Guz is not a bright fellow, but he is very loyal and determined to complete his task. [cite: 50] He is also willing to offer bribes and promises of magical favours. [cite: 52]

nodes.title: The House in the Woods
nodes.description: Rather than stone or glass, the house before you seems to have been formed from the living branches of four sturdy oak trees. [cite: 117] There is a trio of Apes either sleeping or playing with an oversized pair of dice on the lawn, with iron greatswords stuck into the ground next to them. [cite: 129] A Brown Bear is in the outhouse. [cite: 130]

clues.condition: Strength (Athletics) DC 14 or Thieves' Tools DC 12
clues.reveal: The door to the central platform is opened. [cite: 131]

nodes.title: Noke's Bedroom
nodes.description: Noke will cast Expeditious Retreat and flee into the central platform, locking the door behind him. [cite: 164] He will move to his bedroom as fast as he can and casts True Polymorph on the largest thing he can find his bed. [cite: 165] He bursts from the roof of his bedroom riding the Bed Dragon Wyrmling, a beast that looks like a dragon carved from wood with billowing bedsheets for wings. [cite: 186, 187]

clues.reveal: The modifications have left the Wand of True Polymorph extremely unreliable. [cite: 233]

edges.description: Shortly after Shinebright starts his story, Guz and his wolves ambush the party. [cite: 31, 47]
The party deals with Guz and follows the well-trodden route through sparse woodland to Shinebright's old house. [cite: 101, 104]
The party breaches the central platform and forces Noke to retreat to his bedroom. [cite: 164]
